title: UPXDUMI Hook and Loop Tape 30mm x 5m Multipurpose Strong Self Adhesive Strips Heavy Duty Double Sided Sticky Back Roll Suitable for Home Carpet Sofa Picture Hanging Fabric Industrial Outdoor Black
features: 【Professional Level Adhesive Tape】Hook and loop self-adhesive tape is designed for easy peel and stick applications, with fasteners consisting of hook and loop that tear or stick at any time after installation. Made from the latest nylon material for outstanding durability, making it ideal for long term tool organisation, hanging, assembling, fixing and many other household uses

【Strong Grip】Our self adhesive tape veneer has fine loop on one side and tight hook on the other, the combination of which provides a strong grip and firm fit. The included strong adhesive holds items in place without the need to punch holes in the surface. Adhesive will reach maximum strength after 24 hours so please wait 24 hours

【Free Cutting】Set includes 1 roll of hook sticky tape and 1 roll of loop sticky tape，each roll is 5 metres long and 3cm wide. It can be cut to your desired length or shape, gives you more options and self-design opportunities, it brings great convenience to life

【Multi-Purpose】Hook loop adhesive tape is a necessity in everyday life, perfect for lightweight items such as homes, offices, holiday decorations, carpet grippers, sofas, remotes, blackout blind, electrical outlets, car mat clips, shoes, home components, posters, picture hanging, pedalboard, hats, and a variety of gadgets

【Indoor and Outdoor Use】Our self-adhesive tapes can be used on smooth and dry surfaces such as glass, marble, ceramics, wood, metal, tiles, plastics and many fabrics. Self-adhesive tapes cannot be used on leather, pu, brick walls, blocks, concrete, plush fabrics, concrete walls, painted walls and uneven surfaces

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: fastening straps, attaching patches, securing insulation covers, adjustable closures on clothing and bags
